scenario.name: Weekend Appointment Attempt
scenario.persona: Linda Baker, 45 years old, DOB June 3 1980. Busy working mom, assumes the office is open weekends.
scenario.goal: Schedule an appointment for this Saturday morning.
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent clearly explain the office is closed on weekends and offer a weekday alternative

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
I'm Linda Baker. I'm looking to schedule an appointment for this Saturday morning.
Your patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July. 4th 2000.  How may I help you today?
Actually, my date of birth is June 3rd, 1980. I'm trying to schedule an appointment for this Saturday morning.
Thanks for sharing your date of birth. Linda can you tell me the reason for your visit? For example, is this for a routine checkup, a new patient consultation, a follow-up or something urgent.
It's for a follow-up appointment. I want to make sure everything's okay.
Do you have a specific provider? You'd like to see or are you open to anyone available?
I'm open to seeing anyone available this Saturday morning.
It looks like you already have a follow-up appointment booked, if you'd like I can help you reschedule or cancel your current appointment, would you like to do that or do you need something else?
Oh, I wasn't aware of that. If it's not on Saturday, could you help me reschedule it to this Saturday morning?

Let me check for available times this Saturday morning so we can reschedule your follow-up appointment, 1 moment.  I'm unable to reschedule your follow-up appointment directly. I'll connect you with a live support agent who can assist you further. Please. Hold on a moment.  I can help you schedule an appointment, but it looks like I need to connect you to our patient support team to finish booking. Please stay on the line while I transfer you.  Connecting you to a representative, please wait.  Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.
It seems there was a mix-up. I'll call back later to try scheduling again for Saturday morning.
